channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mark Carney Justifies New Pipeline Amid Climate Concerns and Wildfire Challenges
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has defended his government's decision to proceed with a new oil pipeline project despite growing scrutiny over Canada's climate commitments and ongoing wildfires in norther...

item.title: APIs: Bridging AI and Business Processes Through Secure Communication
item.description: This article explores how Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) act as the critical link between artificial intelligence (AI) and real-world business operations. APIs are sets of rules that enable...

item.title: Ben Shapiro Criticizes JD Vance for Embracing Democratic Policies

item.title: ABS-CBN Introduces CPR as Word of the Day for July 17, 2026
item.description: The article announces CPR as the Word of the Day for July 17, 2026, highlighting ABS-CBN's commitment to public service and Filipino values. It emphasizes the company's role as a leading media and ent...

item.title: Tragedy Strikes Uganda School Bus: 20 Students and One Adult Killed in Kapchorwa Crash
item.description: A school bus carrying pupils from King David Junior School crashed while returning from an educational tour in Kapchorwa District, Uganda, killing 20 children and one adult. The incident occurred on J...

item.title: Whittlesea Council Lists Liquidations for July 16

item.title: Matty Healy Hosts Stag Do With The 1975 Tribute Band Ahead of Engagement to Gabbriette
item.description: Matty Healy, frontman of The 1975, recently celebrated his upcoming wedding to model and musician Gabbriette by hosting a stag do in Malibu. During the event, he performed with a tribute band recreati...

item.title: Arizona GOP Candidate Faces Primary Challenge Over Sexual Scandals and Trump Endorsement

item.title: Bill Gates Explores Renewable Energy Potential in Pilbara for Data Centers

item.title: Midwestern Republicans Criticize Canada's Forest Management Amid Wildfire Smoke Concerns

item.title: Spain Expands Visa-Free Access to 8 African Countries for Short Stays
item.description: Spain has updated its visa-free travel policy, allowing citizens of eight African countries to visit the nation for up to 90 days without needing a visa. The newly included nations are Rwanda, Mauriti...

item.title: 14 members of the Ugly Americans gang charged with serious crimes in Cape Town
item.description: The State and police are pursuing justice against 14 alleged members of the Ugly Americans gang, accused of orchestrating a two-decade reign of terror in Cape Town. The case, centralised to Mitchells ...

item.title: Gerontocracy and Political Dynasties: Challenges to Youth Representation in Philippine Politics
item.description: The article critiques the dominance of elderly politicians, particularly from established dynastic families, in Philippine politics. It highlights how this 'gerontocracy' marginalizes younger, non-dyn...

item.title: Obi calls for EFCC to prioritize corruption cases over social media critics
item.description: Peter Obi, the NDC presidential candidate, has called on the EFCC to focus on major corruption cases and strategic priorities instead of targeting social media activists. Through his media team, Obi c...

item.title: Pakistan's finance minister to engage in trade and tariff discussions with U.S. officials

item.title: Uasin Gishu MCA Malel's Daughter Graduates from UK University, Parents Attend Ceremony
item.description: Deputy Speaker of Uasin Gishu County Assembly Sarah Malel celebrated her daughter Brenda Bii's graduation from a UK university on 16 July 2026. Both parents traveled to the UK to attend the ceremony, ...

item.title: Tanzania commits to electrifying all 64,359 subdivisions by 2030
item.description: The Tanzanian government has reaffirmed its commitment to connecting all 64,359 subdivisions across the country to electricity by 2030, aiming to expand energy access in rural areas and drive economic...

item.title: WHO updates dementia prevention guidelines, adding air pollution as a key modifiable risk factor
